reference: Hi. As you mentioned that you have sciatica pain in your leg and are taking short wave diathermy, yes, it will help you for sure. Along with that, Interferential Therapy is beneficial in relieving sciatica pain. Additionally, exercises for back strengthening, such as straight leg raises and stretching, will also help you. It will take time to heal, but with the correct treatment, you will achieve complete relief. I wish you good health.
text: Hi, as you mentioned that you have sciatica in the leg and are taking short wave diathermy, yes it will help you for sure. Along with that, interferential therapy is beneficial in relieving sciatica. Additionally, exercises for back strengthening such as straight leg raises and stretching will also help you. It will take time to heal, but with the correct treatment, you will achieve complete relief. I wish you good health.
